tool.name: waf_detector
tool.description: Detect and fingerprint Web Application Firewalls (WAF).
tool.details: Common Use Cases: - Detect if WAF is present - Identify specific WAF vendor (Cloudflare, Akamai, AWS WAF, etc.) - Test common WAF bypass techniques

parameter.name: action
parameter.description: The detection action: - detect: Detect if WAF is present - fingerprint: Identify specific WAF vendor - test_bypass: Test WAF bypass techniques

returns.description: Detection results and WAF fingerprint information

tool.examples:
# Detect WAF
detect https://example.com
# Fingerprint WAF vendor
fingerprint https://example.com
# Test bypass techniques
test_bypass https://example.com
